rulings.Case Title: THE CLIENT SERVER FACTORY INC VS. EMBARCADERO TECHNOLOGIES INC
rulings.Calendar Matter: DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
rulings.Rulings: DEFENDANT WILLIAMS TECHNOLOGIES INC DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT SUSTAIN-WITH LEAVE TO AMEND AS TO 6TH CAUSE OF ACTION AS TO ALL MOVANTS TO PLEAD CAUSE OF ACTION FOR UNLAWFUL BUSINESS PRACTICE, PLAINTIFF NEEDS TO HIGHLIGHT THE STATUTE, REGULATION OR LAW BREACHED. SUSTAIN-WITHOUT LEAVE TO AMEND AS TO 10TH CAUSE OF ACTION(INJUNCTION)NOT A CAUSE OF ACTION AND PRAYER SEEKS INJUNCTIVE RELIEF. OVERRULE- AS TO REMAINING DEMURRER TO CAUSE OF ACTION.MOVING PARTY TO PREPARE ORDER.(302/REQ/PB)
